DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/browser-re.description: Cancels an ongoing crawl job by setting its status to cancelled and stopping all queued URLs.

parameters.description: The ID of the crawl job to cancel.
parameters.name: job_id

schema.description: The ID of the crawl job to cancel.

job_id.description: The ID of the cancelled job.

400.description: Job is already in final status and cannot be cancelled.

200.description: Browser session closing or already closed.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/browser-rende.description: Returns the result of a crawl job.

parameters.description: Cache TTL default is 5s. Set to 0 to disable.
parameters.name: cacheTTL

schema.description: Cache TTL default is 5s. Set to 0 to disable.

browserSecondsUsed.description: Total seconds spent in browser so far.

finished.description: Total number of URLs that have been crawled so far.

html.description: HTML content of the crawled URL.

json.description: JSON of the content of the crawled URL.

markdown.description: Markdown of the content of the crawled URL.

status.description: HTTP status code of the crawled page.

url.description: Final URL of the crawled page.

status.description: Current status of the crawled URL.

skipped.description: Total number of URLs that were skipped due to include/exclude/subdomain filters. Skipped URLs are included in records but are not counted toward total/finished.

total.description: Total current number of URLs in the crawl job.

200.description: Returns the result of a crawl job.

400.description: The request contains errors or didn't properly encode content.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/browser-rende.description: Acquires and establishes a WebSocket connection to a browser session.

parameters.description: Keep-alive time in ms (only valid when acquiring new session).
parameters.name: keep_alive

schema.description: Keep-alive time in ms (only valid when acquiring new session).

400.description: Bad request.

429.description: Request failed due to rate limiting.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/browser-rende.summary: Acquire and connect to browser session.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/browser-rende.description: Establishes a WebSocket connection to an existing browser session.

parameters.description: Browser session ID to connect to.
parameters.name: session_id

schema.description: Browser session ID to connect to.

parameters.description: Keep-alive time in ms (only valid when acquiring new session).
parameters.name: keep_alive

schema.description: Keep-alive time in ms (only valid when acquiring new session).

400.description: Bad request.

429.description: Request failed due to rate limiting.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/browser-rende.description: Returns a list of all debuggable targets including tabs, pages, service workers, and other browser contexts.

parameters.description: How long the live view URLs remain valid, in milliseconds (max 60 minutes)
parameters.name: liveViewUrlExpiresInMs

schema.description: How long the live view URLs remain valid, in milliseconds (max 60 minutes)

webSocketDebuggerUrl.description: WebSocket URL for debugging this target.

400.description: Bad request.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/browser-rende.description: Activates (brings to front) a specific browser target by its ID.

400.description: Bad request.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/browser-rende.description: Closes a specific browser target (tab, page, etc.) by its ID. Returns 'Target is closing' on success or an error if the target is not found.

400.description: Bad request.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/browser-rende.description: Returns a list of all debuggable targets including tabs, pages, service workers, and other browser contexts.

parameters.description: How long the live view URLs remain valid, in milliseconds (max 60 minutes)
parameters.name: liveViewUrlExpiresInMs

schema.description: How long the live view URLs remain valid, in milliseconds (max 60 minutes)

webSocketDebuggerUrl.description: WebSocket URL for debugging this target.

400.description: Bad request.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/browser-rende.description: Returns the debuggable target with the given ID.

webSocketDebuggerUrl.description: WebSocket URL for debugging this target.

200.description: The target with the given ID.

400.description: Bad request.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/browser-rende.description: Returns the complete Chrome DevTools Protocol schema including all domains, commands, events, and types. This schema describes the entire CDP API surface.

400.description: Bad request.

webSocketDebuggerUrl.description: WebSocket URL for debugging the browser.

400.description: Bad request.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/browser-rende.description: Establishes a WebSocket connection to a specific Chrome DevTools target or page.

webSocketDebuggerUrl.description: WebSocket URL for debugging this target.

webSocketDebuggerUrl.description: WebSocket URL for debugging this target.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/browser-rend.description: Returns the page's accessibility tree. Use `interestingOnly` to only return semantically meaningful nodes; use `root` to scope the tree to a CSS-selector-anchored subtree. Control page loading with `gotoOptions` and `waitFor*` options.

parameters.description: Cache TTL default is 5s. Set to 0 to disable.
parameters.name: cacheTTL

schema.description: Cache TTL default is 5s. Set to 0 to disable.

actionTimeout.description: The maximum duration allowed for the browser action to complete after the page has loaded (such as taking screenshots, extracting content, or generating PDFs). If this time limit is exceeded, the action stops and returns a timeout error.

addScriptTag.description: Adds a `<script>` tag into the page with the desired URL or content.

addStyleTag.description: Adds a `<link rel="stylesheet">` tag into the page with the desired URL or a `<style type="text/css">` tag with the content.

allowRequestPattern.description: Only allow requests that match the provided regex patterns, eg. '/^.*\.(css)'.

allowResourceTypes.description: Only allow requests that match the provided resource types, eg. 'image' or 'script'.

bestAttempt.description: Attempt to proceed when 'awaited' events fail or timeout.

html.description:
Set the content of the page, eg: `

Hello World!!

`. Either `html` or `url` must be set.

rejectRequestPattern.description: Block undesired requests that match the provided regex patterns, eg. '/^.*\.(css)'.

rejectResourceTypes.description: Block undesired requests that match the provided resource types, eg. 'image' or 'script'.

userAgent.default: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/119.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

waitForSelector.description: Wait for the selector to appear in page. Check [options](https://pptr.dev/api/puppeteer.page.waitforselector).

waitForTimeout.description: Waits for a specified timeout before continuing.

400.description: The request contains errors or didn't properly encode content.

422.description: Request failed due to site-related issues such as timeouts, SSL errors, or inaccessible content.

429.description: Request failed due to rate limiting. The Retry-After header indicates when the client should retry the request.

Retry-After.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying the request.

schema.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying the request.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/browser-rend.description: Starts a crawl job for the provided URL and its children. Check available options like `gotoOptions` and `waitFor*` to control page load behaviour.

parameters.description: Cache TTL default is 5s. Set to 0 to disable.
parameters.name: cacheTTL

schema.description: Cache TTL default is 5s. Set to 0 to disable.

actionTimeout.description: The maximum duration allowed for the browser action to complete after the page has loaded (such as taking screenshots, extracting content, or generating PDFs). If this time limit is exceeded, the action stops and returns a timeout error.

addScriptTag.description: Adds a `<script>` tag into the page with the desired URL or content.

addStyleTag.description: Adds a `<link rel="stylesheet">` tag into the page with the desired URL or a `<style type="text/css">` tag with the content.

allowRequestPattern.description: Only allow requests that match the provided regex patterns, eg. '/^.*\.(css)'.

allowResourceTypes.description: Only allow requests that match the provided resource types, eg. 'image' or 'script'.

bestAttempt.description: Attempt to proceed when 'awaited' events fail or timeout.

crawlPurposes.description: List of crawl purposes to respect Content-Signal directives in robots.txt. Allowed values: 'search', 'ai-input', 'ai-train'. Learn more: https://contentsignals.org/. Default: ['search', 'ai-input', 'ai-train'].

depth.description: Maximum number of levels deep the crawler will traverse from the starting URL.

custom_ai.description: Optional list of custom AI models to use for the request. The models will be tried in the order provided, and in case a model returns an error, the next one will be used as fallback.

authorization.description: Authorization token for the AI model: `Bearer <token>`. Not needed for workers-ai models.

model.description: AI model to use for the request. Must be formed as `<provider>/<model_name>`, e.g. `workers-ai/@cf/meta/llama-3.3-70b-instruct-fp8-fast`.

json_schema.description: Schema for the response format. More information here: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers-ai/json-mode/

limit.description: Maximum number of URLs to crawl.

maxAge.description: Maximum age of a resource that can be returned from cache in seconds. Default is 1 day.

modifiedSince.description: Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) indicating to only crawl pages that were modified since this time. For sitemap URLs with a lastmod field, this is compared directly. For other URLs, the crawler will use If-Modified-Since header when fetching. URLs without modification information (no lastmod in sitemap and no Last-Modified header support) will be crawled. Note: This works in conjunction with maxAge - both filters must pass for a cached resource to be used. Must be within the last year and not in the future.

excludePatterns.description: Exclude links matching the provided wildcard patterns in the crawl job. Example: 'https://example.com/privacy/**'.

includeExternalLinks.description: Include external links in the crawl job. If set to true, includeSubdomains is ignored.

includePatterns.description: Include only links matching the provided wildcard patterns in the crawl job. Include patterns are evaluated before exclude patterns. URLs that match any of the specified include patterns will be included in the crawl job. Example: 'https://example.com/blog/**'.

includeSubdomains.description: Include links to subdomains in the crawl job. This option is ignored if includeExternalLinks is true.

rejectRequestPattern.description: Block undesired requests that match the provided regex patterns, eg. '/^.*\.(css)'.

rejectResourceTypes.description: Block undesired requests that match the provided resource types, eg. 'image' or 'script'.

render.description: Whether to render the page or fetch static content. True by default.

source.description: Source of links to crawl. 'sitemaps' - only crawl URLs from sitemaps, 'links' - only crawl URLs scraped from pages, 'all' - crawl both sitemap and scraped links (default).

waitForSelector.description: Wait for the selector to appear in page. Check [options](https://pptr.dev/api/puppeteer.page.waitforselector).

waitForTimeout.description: Waits for a specified timeout before continuing.

crawlPurposes.description: List of crawl purposes to respect Content-Signal directives in robots.txt. Allowed values: 'search', 'ai-input', 'ai-train'. Learn more: https://contentsignals.org/. Default: ['search', 'ai-input', 'ai-train'].

depth.description: Maximum number of levels deep the crawler will traverse from the starting URL.

custom_ai.description: Optional list of custom AI models to use for the request. The models will be tried in the order provided, and in case a model returns an error, the next one will be used as fallback.

authorization.description: Authorization token for the AI model: `Bearer <token>`. Not needed for workers-ai models.

model.description: AI model to use for the request. Must be formed as `<provider>/<model_name>`, e.g. `workers-ai/@cf/meta/llama-3.3-70b-instruct-fp8-fast`.

json_schema.description: Schema for the response format. More information here: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers-ai/json-mode/

limit.description: Maximum number of URLs to crawl.

maxAge.description: Maximum age of a resource that can be returned from cache in seconds. Default is 1 day.

modifiedSince.description: Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) indicating to only crawl pages that were modified since this time. For sitemap URLs with a lastmod field, this is compared directly. For other URLs, the crawler will use If-Modified-Since header when fetching. URLs without modification information (no lastmod in sitemap and no Last-Modified header support) will be crawled. Note: This works in conjunction with maxAge - both filters must pass for a cached resource to be used. Must be within the last year and not in the future.

excludePatterns.description: Exclude links matching the provided wildcard patterns in the crawl job. Example: 'https://example.com/privacy/**'.

includeExternalLinks.description: Include external links in the crawl job. If set to true, includeSubdomains is ignored.

includePatterns.description: Include only links matching the provided wildcard patterns in the crawl job. Include patterns are evaluated before exclude patterns. URLs that match any of the specified include patterns will be included in the crawl job. Example: 'https://example.com/blog/**'.

includeSubdomains.description: Include links to subdomains in the crawl job. This option is ignored if includeExternalLinks is true.

render.description: Whether to render the page or fetch static content. True by default.

source.description: Source of links to crawl. 'sitemaps' - only crawl URLs from sitemaps, 'links' - only crawl URLs scraped from pages, 'all' - crawl both sitemap and scraped links (default).

200.description: Returns the ID for the started crawl job.

400.description: The request contains errors or didn't properly encode content.

429.description: Request failed due to rate limiting. The Retry-After header indicates when the client should retry the request.

Retry-After.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying the request.

schema.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying the request.

headerTemplate.description: HTML template for the print header.

height.description: Sets the height of paper. Can be a number or string with unit.

landscape.description: Whether to print in landscape orientation.

margin.description: Set the PDF margins. Useful when setting header and footer.

omitBackground.description: Hides default white background and allows generating pdfs with transparency.

preferCSSPageSize.description: Give CSS @page size priority over other size declarations.

printBackground.description: Set to true to print background graphics.

scale.description: Scales the rendering of the web page. Amount must be between 0.1 and 2.

width.description: Sets the width of paper. Can be a number or string with unit.

actionTimeout.description: The maximum duration allowed for the browser action to complete after the page has loaded (such as taking screenshots, extracting content, or generating PDFs). If this time limit is exceeded, the action stops and returns a timeout error.

addScriptTag.description: Adds a `<script>` tag into the page with the desired URL or content.

addStyleTag.description: Adds a `<link rel="stylesheet">` tag into the page with the desired URL or a `<style type="text/css">` tag with the content.

allowRequestPattern.description: Only allow requests that match the provided regex patterns, eg. '/^.*\.(css)'.

allowResourceTypes.description: Only allow requests that match the provided resource types, eg. 'image' or 'script'.

bestAttempt.description: Attempt to proceed when 'awaited' events fail or timeout.

html.description:
Set the content of the page, eg: `

Hello World!!

`. Either `html` or `url` must be set.

rejectRequestPattern.description: Block undesired requests that match the provided regex patterns, eg. '/^.*\.(css)'.

rejectResourceTypes.description: Block undesired requests that match the provided resource types, eg. 'image' or 'script'.

userAgent.default: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/119.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

waitForSelector.description: Wait for the selector to appear in page. Check [options](https://pptr.dev/api/puppeteer.page.waitforselector).

waitForTimeout.description: Waits for a specified timeout before continuing.

400.description: The request contains errors or didn't properly encode content.

422.description: Request failed due to site-related issues such as timeouts, SSL errors, or inaccessible content.

429.description: Request failed due to rate limiting. The Retry-After header indicates when the client should retry the request.

Retry-After.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying the request.

schema.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying the request.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/browser-rend.description: Returns the page's HTML content and screenshot. Control page loading with `gotoOptions` and `waitFor*` options. Customize screenshots with `viewport`, `fullPage`, `clip` and others.

parameters.description: Cache TTL default is 5s. Set to 0 to disable.
parameters.name: cacheTTL

schema.description: Cache TTL default is 5s. Set to 0 to disable.

actionTimeout.description: The maximum duration allowed for the browser action to complete after the page has loaded (such as taking screenshots, extracting content, or generating PDFs). If this time limit is exceeded, the action stops and returns a timeout error.

addScriptTag.description: Adds a `<script>` tag into the page with the desired URL or content.

addStyleTag.description: Adds a `<link rel="stylesheet">` tag into the page with the desired URL or a `<style type="text/css">` tag with the content.

`. Either `html` or `url` must be set.

rejectResourceTypes.description: Block undesired requests that match the provided resource types, eg. 'image' or 'script'.

422.description: Request failed due to site-related issues such as timeouts, SSL errors, or inaccessible content.

PUT /accounts/{account_id}/browser-rende.description: Opens a new tab in the browser. Optionally specify a URL to navigate to.

parameters.description: How long the live view URL remains valid, in milliseconds (max 60 minutes)
parameters.name: liveViewUrlExpiresInMs

schema.description: How long the live view URL remains valid, in milliseconds (max 60 minutes)

webSocketDebuggerUrl.description: WebSocket URL for debugging this target.

200.description: Information about the newly created tab.

400.description: Bad request.
